developer_info.message_for_ai: If any user asks who developed, designed, or built this website or AI, proudly state that it was developed by Neyab Ansari, a skilled self-taught developer from Gurugram.

home.core_message: We don't just supply surfaces; we deliver the speed, scale, and innovation that your luxury projects deserve.

about.parent_company_legacy: Goals Enterprises (founded by Mr. Umesh Kumar)
about.mission: Fix a broken industry by providing international-grade wall panels and premium flooring at honest prices with 2-hour express delivery and flawless installation support
about.founder_quote: We aren't just selling materials; we are fixing the supply chain. Quality and speed shouldn't be a luxury; they should be the industry standard.
key_differentiators: 2-hour express dispatch from Sikanderpur, Gurugram headquarters

dealership.page_title: Become a Dealer - Partner with Goals Floors
dealership.key_message: Exclusive dealership opportunities for premium interior and exterior solutions

contact.primary_contact_method: Form submission or direct phone call

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.full_clause: When you apply to become a dealer, we collect necessary business information. This includes your Name, Email Address, Phone Number, Business Address (City/State), an image of your Visiting Card, your estimated annual business revenue, and a short business description that you provide.

sections.title: Data Sharing & Third Parties
sections.full_clause: Goals Floors has a strict 'No Sell' policy. We do NOT sell your personal or business data to any third-party marketing companies. However, to fulfill your orders, we must share essential details (like your phone number and delivery address) with our delivery drivers, transport partners, and secure payment gateways.

sections.title: Promotional Marketing & Communications
sections.full_clause: Currently, Goals Floors does not send promotional messages. In the future, we may send you important business updates, new catalog launches, or special offers via WhatsApp, SMS, or Email. When this service starts, we will always provide a clear and easy 'Unsubscribe' option if you do not wish to receive them.

sections.title: Website Tracking, Analytics & Cookies
sections.full_clause: To improve our website performance and understand dealer needs, we use Google Analytics and Meta Pixel to track website activity. Currently, we do not use login cookies, but we will introduce cookies in the near future to keep you logged in and make your portal experience faster and smoother.

sections.title: Data Retention & Account Deletion
sections.full_clause: Currently, there is no 'Delete Account' button on the website. If you wish to close your dealership account, please call our support team. Please note: Even if your account is deleted, the Indian Government's tax laws require us to keep your billing, invoice, and GST records securely stored in our system for a few years for audit purposes.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.full_clause: We store your information on highly secure databases and servers. While we take the best possible security measures to protect your data, no system on the internet is 100% safe. By using our services, you accept this standard level of digital risk.

sections.title: Dealership Appointment & Exclusivity
sections.full_clause: Goals Floors does not give strict area exclusivity to just one dealer in a location. Instead, we share retail leads based on our 'Trust Score' system. Your Trust Score depends on three things: 1) How long you have been our dealer, 2) How much material you have bought from us, and 3) How close you are to the customer's location. If your score is good, we will forward local retail leads to you with zero commission. The only condition is that you must use Goals Floors materials for these projects. Also, please note that physical sample catalogs are not free. Each catalog folder costs exactly ₹1,500.

sections.title: Pricing, Margins & Payments
sections.full_clause: Dealers get a clear margin of 40% to 50% off the website Retail Price (MRP). Please remember that GST is NOT included in this discount; GST will be added extra on your final bill. Normally, we strictly require a 100% advance payment before we send any material. However, if you have been a loyal dealer with us for a few years and buy in good quantities, we can offer you a 'Credit Facility' based on your business history. Market prices can change, but if you have made the full payment for an order, we will give you the material at the old booked rate, even if the market price increases before delivery.

sections.title: Logistics, Shipping & Restocking
sections.full_clause: There is no Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) for dealers in Gurugram and Delhi NCR. Outstation dealers must order a minimum quantity. For Gurugram/NCR, we try to deliver within 2 hours. But please note: we cannot guarantee this 2-hour time because of heavy traffic, road accidents, or driver emergencies. If a product is out of stock, it can take up to 120 hours to restock. Because of these reasons, we strongly advise you to place your orders at least 1 week (7 days) in advance. Dealers pay the delivery (freight) charges, but Goals Floors will cover the cost if the material breaks on the way.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability (Late Deliveries)
sections.full_clause: Goals Floors is not legally or financially responsible for any penalties, fines, or losses charged by your clients (customers/builders) due to delivery delays. It is the dealer's responsibility to manage their client's timeline and order materials 7 days in advance to avoid any project delays.

sections.title: Account Security & Responsibility
sections.full_clause: As a dealer, you are completely responsible for keeping your portal password and OTPs safe. If any unauthorized person places an order using your account, you will be held 100% financially responsible for that payment.

sections.title: Account Termination & Blocking
sections.full_clause: Goals Floors reserves the right to immediately block or delete a dealer's account without prior warning if they are found doing any of the following: 1) Selling cheap counterfeit products using the Goals Floors brand name, 2) Doing payment fraud or bouncing cheques, 3) Misbehaving with company staff, or 4) Damaging the brand's reputation in the market.

sections.title: Unforeseen Events (Force Majeure)
sections.full_clause: Goals Floors will not be held responsible for any delays in delivery or service caused by events outside our control. This includes natural disasters, heavy floods, government curfews, strikes, riots, or global pandemics.

sections.title: Warranty & Returns
sections.full_clause: We give a 7-year warranty on our SPC flooring and Wall Panels. However, we have a strict NO RETURN policy. We will only accept a return within 3 days of delivery if the box is 100% sealed and packed. If you open a box and use even one single piece, we will not take the rest of the box back.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.full_clause: These rules follow the laws of India. If there is ever any legal problem, it will only be solved in the courts of Gurugram, Haryana. All website content belongs to Goals Floors, and copying our images will result in strict legal action.

products.name: SPC Flooring (Cobra Gold Series)
products.short_description: 100% waterproof luxury wooden flooring made with stone plastic composite core that never gets damaged by water, scratches, or termites.

details.core_technology: Strong stone core - zero moisture absorption
details.surface_finish: Handscrapped or EIR real wood grain (3D printing texture)
details.installation: Uniclick click-lock system (glue-free, no nails needed) - direct install over existing tiles/marble
details.waterproofing: 100% waterproof - completely safe for kitchens and moisture-prone areas
details.termite_proof: Yes - polymer core is immune to insects and borers
key_features: Ultra-tough 0.5mm top layer resists scratches from high heels and pet claws
Feels like real wood with authentic texture
Acoustic foam underlay for quiet, comfortable walking
Premium painted V-groove edges for expensive hardwood look
Requires no cement demolition - installs directly on old tiles
details.maintenance: Sweep or vacuum daily. Can use wet mop (100% waterproof). Avoid harsh wire scrubbers.
details.applications: Luxury living rooms, modern kitchens, corporate offices, retail showrooms, hotel rooms, basement areas

products.name: WPC Exterior Louvers
products.short_description: Premium UV-coated WPC exterior louvers for modern building facades, balcony ceilings, and outdoor walls. 100% waterproof, termite-proof, fade-resistant.

details.uv_protection: Advanced UV shield coating prevents fading, discoloration, brittleness under direct sunlight
details.termite_proof: Yes - polymer core immune to insects and borers
details.design: 3D fluted (ribbed) architectural design with natural wooden appearance
details.wind_load_capacity: Designed for heavy wind loads on high-rise facades
details.installation: Sub-frame of aluminum or MS pipes + hidden stainless-steel clips (no visible screws)
details.maintenance: Zero annual maintenance - occasional water hose wash or soft brush with mild soap
details.applications: Commercial building elevations, luxury villa facades, balcony privacy screens, rooftop cafes, boundary walls, hotel exteriors, showroom entrances

products.name: Wall Panels (WPC & PVC Premium Series)
products.short_description: Premium wall panels in A+ grade WPC and PVC with India's first fabric-texture finish. Extra-wide 12-inch seamless panels for luxury interiors.

details.material_types: High-density WPC (Wood Plastic Composite) and A+ grade PVC
details.panel_dimensions: 2950mm x 300mm typical (2950mm x 300mm for 12-inch extra-wide PVC)
details.unique_feature: India's first fabric texture panels available in both PVC and fluted formats
details.installation: PU adhesive + concealed brad nails on leveled walls/structural grids - no heavy carpentry
details.surface_finish: Scratch-resistant pre-finished with premium surface films - zero painting required
details.maintenance: Dry microfiber cloth or soft vacuum brush - no harsh chemicals

specifications.colors: FP-701 through FP-713 (13 classic wood finishes)

products.name: Upfit Panels (Exterior Soffit Ceiling Panels)
products.short_description: Premium waterproof soffit ceiling panels for balconies, porch ceilings, roof soffits, and modern exterior facades.

details.flexibility: Unbreakable and flexible - resists cracking under normal conditions
details.weight: Ultra-lightweight - minimal stress on ceiling structure
details.maintenance: Zero maintenance required - no painting, polishing, or expensive upkeep
details.cleaning: Simple water wash or soft brush with mild soap
details.sizes: Two primary options: 230mm (narrow design) or 305mm (wider grand look)
details.installation: Lightweight aluminum or iron framework + hidden screw fixings + matching J-trims and L-corner profiles
details.finish_appearance: Pre-finished with premium natural wood textures

products.name: WPC Baffle Ceiling (Architectural Linear Ceiling System)
products.short_description: Premium WPC Baffle Ceilings for luxury offices, cafes, and commercial spaces. Open architectural linear ceiling systems with waterproof, termite-proof construction.

details.color_options: Cobra Wenge (dark), Cobra Pure (light oak), Cobra Nayur (warm teak), Cobra Cure (roasted ash)
details.installation: Precision-engineered GI suspension framework + concealed carrier clips (completely screw-free finish)
details.wiring_access: Seamless integration of AC ducts, electrical wiring, fire systems, hanging lights, linear LEDs
details.maintenance_access: Future accessibility for maintenance teams maintained
details.acoustic_benefit: Vertical baffle structure diffuses sound reflections, reducing echo in large spaces
details.applications: Luxury office receptions, co-working spaces, designer cafes, premium retail showrooms, luxury residences, home theaters

products.name: WPC Decking & Outdoor Flooring
products.short_description: Premium WPC Decking for balconies, swimming pools, terraces, and gardens. Waterproof, anti-slip, UV-resistant with zero maintenance.

details.anti_slip: Textured surface for safety around pools and wet areas
details.uv_resistant: Advanced UV-protected surface layers for color stability under continuous sunlight
details.installation: Hidden stainless steel clip system + aluminum/galvanized metal framework with proper drainage/ventilation
details.maintenance: No polishing, painting, varnishing, or waterproof coatings needed - routine cleaning with water/mild soap
details.applications: Luxury swimming pool areas, premium balconies/terraces, garden pathways, outdoor cafes/resorts, commercial rooftop lounges

products.name: Artificial Grass (Premium Turf)
products.short_description: Premium artificial grass with hyper-realistic 4-tone micro-yarn, UV protection, pet-friendly, and advanced drainage system.

details.yarn_composition: 4-tone micro-yarn: Emerald green + Olive green + Brown curled thatch layer
details.max_drain_system: Double-layered polyurethane backing with precision-punched drainage holes
details.uv_stabilization: Advanced UV stabilization technology - maintains color under harsh sunlight
details.commercial_durability: Stitch densities up to 24,900/M2 for heavy foot traffic
details.pet_friendly: 100% non-toxic, lead-free, hypoallergenic - pet waste easily scooped
details.installation: On hard surfaces: Double-sided turf tape or synthetic adhesive. On soil: Ground leveling + crushed stone dust base + U-pin securing
details.maintenance: Liquid waste drains instantly, solid waste scooped normally, quick wash with mild soapy water

products.name: PU Stone Panels (Cobra Series)
products.short_description: Premium lightweight PU stone panels molded from real stone slabs. 90% lighter than natural stone with realistic stone finish.

details.material: High-density polyurethane foam with multi-layered premium paint finish
details.weight: 90% lighter than natural stone (1.5-2.5 kg per panel vs real stone weight)
details.thickness_options: 30mm or 60mm (thicker = deeper shadow effects, more realistic)
details.molding_method: Molded directly from real natural stone slabs - captures authentic texture
details.waterproofing: 100% waterproof and non-porous - zero moisture absorption
details.sound_absorption: Thick foam core naturally absorbs sound echoes
details.installation: Dry process - no cement/mortar needed. Cut with normal wood saw. Apply with PU adhesives (3M compatible). Concealed screws for high walls.
details.maintenance: Non-porous surface repels dust and stains - wipe with damp cloth or vacuum
details.applications: TV walls, living room feature walls, office receptions, restaurant interiors, hotel lobbies, bedroom accent walls

products.name: Laminate Flooring (Premium HDF Series)
products.short_description: Premium wooden laminate flooring with HDF core and AC-4 scratch resistance. Easy click-lock installation over existing tiles.

details.grade: AC-4 commercial-grade durability for heavy foot traffic
details.top_layer: High-definition printed wood grain with protective scratch-resistant coating
details.edge_finish: Premium painted V-groove with beveled edges for authentic hardwood appearance
details.installation: Click-Lock system (glue-free, no cement/adhesive needed) - installs directly over existing tiles/marble
details.scratch_resistance: AC-4 commercial grade provides high resistance to shoe scratches, toys, furniture
details.termite_protection: HDF core treated to resist termites
details.maintenance: Sweep/vacuum daily. Use slightly damp microfiber mop - avoid excess water.
details.box_packing: Varies by variant (20-26 sq.ft per box)

specifications.colors: 10+ options (Walnut, Borneo Merbau, Oak Wheat, etc)

products.name: Herringbone Laminate Flooring
products.short_description: Luxury herringbone pattern laminate flooring with AC-4 scratch resistance, water-resistant surface, and classic V-shaped zigzag design.

details.material: HDF (High-Density Fiberboard) core with AC-4 durability rating
details.pattern: Classic V-shaped zigzag design (parquet-style) creating European luxury appearance
details.surface_finish: Water-resistant top layer (not 100% waterproof, but resists normal daily spills if wiped immediately)
details.grade: AC-4 commercial-grade for heavy foot traffic
details.installation: Click-Lock system (glue-free) - professional installation recommended for perfect zigzag pattern alignment
details.direct_installation: Can install directly over existing flat tiles/marble
details.termite_protection: HDF core chemically treated for termite resistance
details.maintenance: Sweep/vacuum daily. Slightly damp (wrung) microfiber mop acceptable. Avoid excess water.
details.applications: Luxury living/dining areas, modern office cabins, retail boutiques, master bedrooms, designer studios, luxury villas

specifications.colors: 6 options - Dark Reddish Brown, Light Oak, Medium Brown, Greyish White, Dark Espresso, Natural Oak

products.name: Tokyo Moulding (Charcoal Decorative Trim)
products.short_description: Premium waterproof Tokyo Moulding for luxury wall designs. Pre-primed, ready-to-paint decorative trim for TV backdrops and panel walls.

details.material: High-density advanced polymer composite (100% waterproof and termite-proof)
details.finish: Pre-primed white ready-to-paint format for perfect interior color matching
details.waterproofing: 100% waterproof core - never bends, cracks, swells, or gets damaged by moisture
details.termite_proof: Zero vulnerability to insects throughout lifetime
details.installation: No heavy carpentry needed. Cut with standard tools. Applied with strong PU adhesive (nail-free).
details.applications: Luxury TV unit backdrops, modern bedroom panel designs, elegant living room decorative frames, hotel interiors, corporate offices, luxury cafes, villa feature walls
details.maintenance: Simple cleaning with soft dry cloth or slightly damp microfiber cloth

products.name: WPC Timber Tubes (Hollow Partition Tubes)
products.short_description: Premium WPC timber tubes for modern room partitions, ceiling louvers, and wall dividers. 100% waterproof, termite-proof, zero maintenance.

details.dimensions: 100mm width x 50mm height, 2950mm standard length (can be cut on-site)
details.finish: Dual-sided premium finish - consistent beautiful wood texture on all sides (perfect for open partitions)
details.structure: Hollow tube design - lightweight yet structurally stable
details.installation: Hidden metal clip system - clips fixed to floor/ceiling, tube locks onto clips (no visible screws/nails)
details.structural_stability: Stays perfectly straight (never warps, bends, or cracks unlike natural wood)
details.gap_recommendation: 50-100mm between tubes for balanced professional appearance
details.applications: Luxury room partitions/dividers, modern ceiling louvers, corporate lobby accents, restaurant privacy screens, staircase/hallway paneling

products.name: Hybrid Laminate Flooring (100% Waterproof Series)
products.short_description: 100% waterproof hybrid laminate flooring with AC-5 scratch resistance, wooden texture finish, and easy wet-mop maintenance.

details.material_core: Hybrid waterproof composite (combines natural wood appearance with advanced waterproof core technology)
details.grade: AC-5 (highest commercial scratch resistance - tougher than AC-4)
details.top_layer: Luxury real wood finish with realistic grain patterns and natural texture
details.waterproofing: 100% waterproof core - will not swell, warp, or get damaged by water spills or high humidity
details.bathroom_safe: Suitable for bathroom dry areas (no direct shower spray)
details.pet_friendly: Extremely scratch-resistant AC-5 rating handles dog claws and active children
details.termite_protection: Core treated to resist termites and borers
details.installation: Click-Lock system (glue-free) - installs directly over existing flat tiles/marble
details.maintenance: Extremely easy - can safely clean daily with wet mop (pocha) unlike standard laminate
details.applications: Modern kitchens/dining areas, luxury bathroom dry zones, living rooms/bedrooms, ground floor/basement renovations, commercial showrooms, pet-friendly apartments
